# Prompt Coverage Audit

**Generated by hand 2026-07-19** (ASSETS & PROMPTS AUDIT round). Not a
regenerable script output like [Roster](../../ROSTER.md) — re-derive by
re-running this audit if the code or prompt sheets change materially.
Cross-references every art path the APP CAN REFERENCE against (a) files
that EXIST in `assets/` and (b) prompt-sheet entries that EXIST in
`research/prompts/**`.

**Scope note:** [Roster](../../ROSTER.md) (`build_roster.py`) already
covers, in full per-seat detail: the weekday themes (both Planetary and
Pantheon rosters), the zodiac families (astrology + Chinese), and the
FLAT badge/emblem groups (trinity, season, scale, virtue, sin, mood,
intelligence). This document does **not** repeat that table — see
Roster for those. It covers everything `build_roster.py` does **not**
walk: the `archetype/` tree, `era/`, the subdial masters, ring letters,
icons and the Guide — plus the two items the owner asked to check by
name.

- [Weekday / Zodiac / Flat Badges — see Roster](#see-roster)

<a id="see-roster"></a>

## Weekday / Zodiac / Flat Badges

Referenced by code (`config.defaults.WEEKDAY_*`, `ZODIAC_STYLE_ART_DIRS`,
`EMBLEM_ART_DIRS`, `TRINITY_ART_DIR`, `SEASON_ART_DIR`, `SCALE_ART_DIR`):
**fully covered** — [Roster](../../ROSTER.md) tracks every seat, every
source, both rosters. Every theme already owns a complete prompt sheet
per `research/prompts/___prompts.md`'s own index; the ROSTER shortage
list (196 ChatGPT, 24 Gemini files) is an **art** gap, not a **prompt**
gap — every one of those stems already has a written prompt in its
theme's file. Zero missing prompt sheets found in this collection.

<a id="archetype-set"></a>

## Archetype Set (`assets/archetype/`, `config/archetypes.py`)

Not walked by `build_roster.py` — audited fresh here. Every archetype
group already has a written, complete prompt sheet (`research/prompts/
archetype/*.md`); the evangelist rondels are written INSIDE
`temperaments_prompts.md` rather than their own file (confirmed, not a
gap — the sheet's own file-per-theme rule reads "one file per POINTER
WHEEL", and the evangelists are the temperaments' second column).

| Group | Referenced by code | Gemini art | ChatGPT art | Prompt sheet |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Trinity (paint) | `archetypes.ARCHETYPES["trinity_paint"]` | ✔ 4/4 + 3 rondels | ✔ 4/4 + 3 rondels | `trinity_prompts.md` ✔ |
| Family (light) | `trinity_light` | ✔ 4/4 + 3 rondels | ✔ 4/4 + 3 rondels | `family_prompts.md` ✔ |
| Temperaments (seasons paint) | `seasons_paint` | ✔ 4/4 + Throne | ✔ 4/4, **Throne.png MISSING** | `temperaments_prompts.md` ✔ |
| Tetramorph (seasons light) | `seasons_light` | ✔ 4/4 | ✔ 4/4 | `temperaments_prompts.md` ✔ (own section) |
| Evangelist rondels | `TETRAMORPH_EVANGELIST_FILES` | — 0/4 | — 0/4 | `temperaments_prompts.md` ✔ (own section, "not yet generated" noted in-file) |
| Persons (prism paint) | `prism_paint` | ✔ 4/4 + Seal | ✔ 4/4, **Seal.png MISSING** | `persons_prompts.md` ✔ |
| One Soul (prism light) | `prism_light` | ✔ 6/6 + Union + Child | ✔ 6/6 + Union + Child | `one_soul_prompts.md` ✔ |
| Walks (compass paint) | `compass_paint` | ✔ 8/8 + 8 rondels | ✔ 8/8 + 8 rondels | `walks_prompts.md` ✔ |
| Life — Tree register | `compass_light` (`ARCHETYPE_LIFE_REGISTER="tree"`) | ✔ 8/8 | ✔ 8/8 | `life_prompts.md` ✔ |
| Life — Animals register | `compass_light` | ✔ 8/8 | ✔ 8/8 | `life_prompts.md` ✔ |
| Calendar (12 months) | `defaults` (Calendar pointer pinned slots) | ✔ 12/12 | ✔ 12/12 | `calendar_prompts.md` ✔ |

Two real ART gaps surfaced (prompts already written, just not
generated in the ChatGPT set): **`temperaments/Throne.png`** (shared
center for BOTH Seasons archetypes) and **`persons/Seal.png`** (the
Prism-paint center, the banknote hexagram rosette). Both are on the
Gemini side already — worth a priority regeneration ask since they are
CENTER images (always visible near solar noon/midnight per
`ARCHETYPE_CENTER_WINDOW_DEG`), not a seat that might go unseen.

<a id="compass-objects"></a>

## The Compass Object Question (owner's named check)

**Owner's question:** do prompt sheets and art paths exist for the
Compass estates' OBJECTS (the Crown, the Coin, the Sword…), and is an
object image even wired into the article/hover, or text-only today?

**Answer, with evidence:**

- **Prompt sheet: EXISTS.** `walks_prompts.md` §"The object rondels —
  the second article row" writes all eight: Crown, Coin, Sword, Mask,
  Staff, Book, Plough, Bell.
- **Art: EXISTS**, both sources — `assets/archetype/{gemini,chatgpt}/
  walks/rondel_{Crown,Coin,Sword,Mask,Staff,Book,Plough,Bell}.png` (16
  files total, all present).
- **Wiring: TEXT-ONLY today.** `config/archetypes.py`'s
  `compass_paint` figures pass row2 as a plain STRING (`"The Crown"`,
  `"The Coin"`, …) — no file reference. A repo-wide grep for
  `rondel_` in `.py` files finds it used in exactly ONE place:
  `render/compositor.py`'s Tetramorph three-side hover (the
  EVANGELIST rondels, via `archetypes.TETRAMORPH_EVANGELIST_FILES`).
  No other archetype group's rondel set is read by any render or
  hover code — **the Walks' object rondels, the Trinity's calling
  rondels (`rondel_Judge/Advocate/Prosecutor`) and the Family's
  hearth-role rondels (`rondel_Dawn/Heart/Shield`) all sit on disk,
  fully painted, completely unwired.** The two-row article text
  itself always shows (row2 is just a string everywhere), so nothing
  is BROKEN — the second row simply never gets its own small image
  the way the Tetramorph's evangelist column does.

This is a real product decision, not a bug: wiring the object/calling/
hearth-role rondels would need the SAME three-side-style hover pattern
`render/compositor.py` already built for the evangelists, generalized
from "one special case" to "every archetype's row2 image, when it
exists" (Rule #5 — the pattern already exists once, this would be the
second use, which is exactly when a shared helper earns its keep).
Flagging for the owner/writers' round, not fixing here (audit only).

<a id="era-terms"></a>

## Era Terms (`assets/era/`, `config.defaults.ERA_ART_DIR`)

**Prompt sheet: EXISTS and complete** (`era/era_prompts.md`, per
`___prompts.md`'s own description: Age of Light, Age of Darkness, the
four Starry Seasons, one rose-window emblem each).

**Art: ZERO.** `assets/era/` does not exist on disk at all — neither
source, not one file. This is the single largest all-or-nothing gap
found: a fully-written, ready-to-generate sheet with 0% of its art
produced. `ERA_ART_DIR` is a live code reference (`config/defaults.py`
line 1110) waiting on it.

<a id="subdial-masters"></a>

## Subdial Masters (`assets/badge/subdial/`, `SUBDIAL_ART_DIR`)

**Prompt sheet: EXISTS** (`instrument/subdial_circle_prompts.md`) and
specifies FOUR light variants — `south`, `h3`, `h21`, `center` — of
which only ONE master plate is actually needed per variant (the code
recolors gold/silver/bronze live from whichever single finish lands,
per `SUBDIAL_RECOLOR_*`).

**Art: 1 of 4 variants.** Only `silver/center.png` exists (Gemini only
— matches [Roster](../../ROSTER.md)'s Badges table, which tracks
`center` alone). **`south`, `h3` and `h21` are missing entirely and are
not even surfaced as a shortage row in Roster** (`build_roster.py`
only enumerates the `center` seat for subdial) — flagging here so the
gap is visible; `south`/`h3`/`h21` need their master plates before
the two off-center diamond seats and the lone 24h seat can show real
subdial art instead of the procedural fallback circle.

<a id="other"></a>

## Ring Letters, Icons, Guide — out of the AI-prompt pipeline

- **Ring letters** (`assets/ring/letters/*.png`, `domy.png`,
  `hexagram.png`, `morph.png`) — the owner's own hand-built glyph and
  ring-face library (`RING_LETTER_ART_DIR` comment: "the owner's GOLD
  letter art"), not AI-prompted; no sheet needed, none found, not a
  gap.
- **Icons** (`assets/icons/`, config not yet wired to a constant) —
  its own self-contained, OWNER-FACING sheet already exists:
  `icons/ICONS_SPISAK.md` (14 SVG icons, Serbian instructions by
  explicit owner exception). `assets/icons/` does not exist on disk
  yet — expected, the owner generates "kad kažeš" per the sheet's own
  note. Not a missing-prompt gap; the sheet already covers it.
- **Guide** (`assets/guide/*.png`, 91 files) — the owner's own
  screenshots per the Guide window spec, never AI-prompted; no sheet
  applicable.

<a id="eclipse-queued"></a>

## Eclipse Category Images — WRITTEN (fix round F, 2026-07-19)

The eclipse-category art the Round C "eclipse states by type" work
touched is now **written, not yet generated**. The writers' round (fix
round F) added the sheet
[`eclipse/eclipse_prompts.md`](eclipse/eclipse_prompts.md): SEVEN
night-window rose-window emblems — solar total/annular/partial/hybrid,
lunar total/partial/penumbral — dropping at `assets/eclipse/<Stem>.png`
(`config/defaults.py` `ECLIPSE_ART_DIR`), each doctrine-true to the
sealed state table. The wiring is live and graceful-absent on BOTH
consumers: the Encyclopedia chapters (`app/encyclopedia.py`
`eclipse_solar`/`eclipse_lunar` topics) and the on-dial eclipse hover
badge (`render/compositor.py` `_eclipse_emblem`). **Art: ZERO of 7** —
the sheet is ready to queue; verified `--dry-run` clean (7 images, 0
problems) 2026-07-19.

<a id="missing-prompts"></a>

## MISSING-PROMPTS List

Zero prompt SHEETS are missing for anything the app can currently
reference. Every collection above already has a written sheet. The
outstanding work is entirely ART GENERATION against sheets that
already exist, plus one wiring decision (the row2 rondels) and one
tracking gap (Roster's subdial row):

1. `assets/era/*` — the whole collection, both sources (sheet ready).
2. `assets/badge/subdial/{gold,silver,bronze}/{south,h3,h21}.png` —
   3 of 4 light-variant masters (only need ONE finish per variant;
   sheet ready).
3. `assets/archetype/{gemini,chatgpt}/evangelist/{Mark,Luke,John,
   Matthew}.png` — 8 files, sheet ready (in `temperaments_prompts.md`).
4. `assets/archetype/chatgpt/temperaments/Throne.png` — 1 file, sheet
   ready, ChatGPT-side only (Gemini already has it).
5. `assets/archetype/chatgpt/persons/Seal.png` — 1 file, sheet ready,
   ChatGPT-side only (Gemini already has it).
6. Everything on [Roster](../../ROSTER.md)'s Shortage List (196
   ChatGPT + 24 Gemini) — sheets already exist per theme, tracked
   there, not repeated here.
7. `assets/eclipse/*` — the seven category emblems (solar total/
   annular/partial/hybrid, lunar total/partial/penumbral); sheet
   WRITTEN (fix round F, `eclipse/eclipse_prompts.md`), none generated.

No item above needs a NEW prompt sheet written (item 7's sheet landed
this round); items 1–5 and 7 need art generated against sheets that
already exist, and the Walks/Trinity/Family rondels (§Compass Object
Question) need a wiring decision before more of that art would even be
seen anywhere.
